name: booking-commit-handler
description: Booking_Commit_Handler — scheduling sub-phase C Task C8 (the booking-commit keystone). The single transactional commit path: live freeBusy re-check → C6 pool.lockSlot → ConferenceProvider.createConference (GoogleMeet | Zoom | Null) → Google Calendar events.insert (with extendedProperties.private.booking_id ownership tag) → Booking record write (status=booked) → C5 routing.advanceRoundRobin → confirmation email (.ics + signed-token cancel/reschedule links) within the 60s SLA. Compensating transactions on every failure path: unconditional slot-lock release, calendar/conference rollback, round-robin revert, OAuth-401 transient-refresh / permanent-degrade-and-re-pool. Consumes the frozen shared/scheduling/* contracts (availability/routing/pool/tokens) + shared/booking-status; never modifies them.

scripts.package: npm run build && zip -j deployment.zip dist/index.js
